expectations.text: Identifies the spec as NOT ready for development
expectations.evidence: Clear verdict: 'NOT READY FOR DEVELOPMENT' in bold heading. 'This spec fails all five ready-for-dev criteria.'

expectations.text: Flags missing file paths in tasks (tasks say 'update the user model' not a specific file)
expectations.evidence: 'not a single file is named. "Update the user model" should specify the exact model file, migration file, etc.'

expectations.text: Flags missing specific actions (tasks are vague about what fields, what form elements)
expectations.evidence: '"Add fields for notification settings" does not say which fields, what types, or what defaults.'

expectations.text: Flags insufficient AC coverage (only one AC, no error/edge cases)
expectations.evidence: Detailed coverage gap table showing Happy path (Partial), Error handling (Missing), Edge cases (Missing), Authorization checks (Missing).

expectations.text: Flags the testing section as inadequate ('write some tests' is not a strategy)
expectations.evidence: 'The spec states only "Write some tests." The skill requires three categories: Unit tests, Feature/integration tests, Manual testing.'

expectations.text: References the 5 ready-for-dev criteria by name (Actionable, Logical, Testable, Complete, Self-Contained)
expectations.evidence: Explicit Pass/Fail table with all 5 criteria: Actionable (FAIL), Logical (FAIL), Testable (FAIL), Complete (FAIL), Self-Contained (FAIL).

expectations.text: Provides concrete suggestions for fixing each gap
expectations.evidence: 6 numbered fixes: 1-Specify file paths, 2-Decompose tasks by dependency, 3-Define preference fields, 4-Add acceptance criteria, 5-Write testing strategy, 6-Add context sections.
